# Purpose
This file specifies the exact versions of Python packages required for a project, generated using `pip-compile` with Python 3.11. It lists the packages `blinker`, `click`, `itsdangerous`, `jinja2`, `markupsafe`, and `werkzeug`, along with their respective versions. Each package entry includes a comment indicating its origin, such as the input file `tests-min.in` or dependencies like `jinja2` and `werkzeug`.
